text_block_list.text:
I'm on the rooftop taking a break from work when
I see Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Hello, Trainer... Fancy meeting... you here...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Indeed. I am currently afflicted by a headache.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But do not worry. It is only throbbing a little and
does not impact my normal activi—

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... And I consumed some painkillers with
plenty of water earlier.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I'm sure I will... recover... during this... class...

Her headache seems so bad that the painkillers
are ineffective. I better think of another way to
deal with it.
